title: Branded Content
summary: OVER THE YEARS I'VE WORKED WITH VARIOUS MEDIA COMPANIES TO CREATE CUSTOM CONTENT FOR TRUTHRANGING FROM SHOW INTEGRATIONS TO FULL SERIES. HERE ARE A FEW OF THOSE. WARNING: SHIT GETS WEIRD.
body: TO LAUNCH AN APP CALLED ERASE AND REPLACE WHERE TEENS COULD PHOTOSHOP OUT CIGARETTES IN PICS AND REPLACE THEM WITH COOL ILLUSTRATIONS WE COLLABORATED WITH ERIC ANDRE. HE DID A SKIT WHERE HE PRANKED SMOKERSON THE STREET AND ERASED + REPLACED IN REAL TIME. ALSO HE WORE A SPIDER SUIT.
WE PARTNERED WITH BUZZFEED TO CREATE A MOVIE TRAILER STYLE SHORTABOUT WHAT A WORLD WITHOUT CAT VIDEOS WOULD BE LIKE.
WE CREATED THE FIRST EVER 5 PART "MICROSERIES"CAT DICK WITH ADULT SWIM FEATURINGA CAT DETECTIVE TRYING TO SOLVE THE MYSTERY OF DISAPPEARING VIDEOS.
FOR THE LAUNCH OF LEFT SWIPE DAT WE WORKED WITH HOT PACKAGE TO DOA BIZARRE IN SHOW INTEGRATION IN THE STYLE OF ENTERTAINMENT TONIGHT.
